command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.203 '
cd /opt/moreno-ai
git pull origin main 2>&1 | tail -5
git log --oneline -3
git remote -v | head -2
git status | head -3
ls docs/vm-ecosystem-deployment-plan.md docs/infrastructure-authority-map.md docs/infrastructure-future-state-plan.md
grep -c "Infrastructure Authority Principle" docs/architectural-alignment-directive.md && echo PRINCIPLE_PRESENT
echo GITEA_AUTHORITY_VERIFIED
' 2>&1
